overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in an orange outfit navigating a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The scene transitions from a covered walkway beneath a monorail through open plazas with reflective wet pavement, past prominent neon signage including 'BD SHACK', and concludes with the character ascending a concrete stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath monorail overpass

events.description: approaching the end of the covered corridor, open plaza visible ahead with neon lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet corridor beneath the red-lit monorail structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright clothing walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: large concrete and metal overpass structure with red neon underlighting
smooth concrete building wall lining the right side of the walkway
reflective wet concrete sidewalk mirroring the red neon lights overhead
strip of red neon lighting running along the underside of the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered corridor beneath a monorail overpass, with red neon lights casting reflections on the wet pavement. Other pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction as the corridor opens ahead to a brighter plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with scattered trees and neon signage

events.description: exits the covered corridor into the open plaza, revealing skyscrapers and neon signs
ambient lighting shifts from dominant red to mixed purple and blue neon tones

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the distant BD SHACK neon sign

entered.detail: large red neon sign with 'BD SHACK' text mounted on a building facade
deciduous trees planted in the plaza providing sparse vegetation
tall futuristic glass towers with illuminated windows forming the skyline

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the scene opens into a wide plaza with wet tiled pavement reflecting purple and blue neon lights. The BD SHACK sign becomes visible in the distance on the right, while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background and sparse trees dot the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing beneath elevated monorail tracks with blue lighting

events.description: character transitions from walking to running pace
crossing the street as futuristic vehicles pass by on the left

agents.ego_description: running across the street toward the BD SHACK area, weaving through pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic red car driving along the street parallel to the crosswalk
pedestrian in yellow pants walking ahead of the character

entered.detail: elevated monorail track structure illuminated with bright cyan blue neon lights
storefront with bright blue '24/7 STORE' neon signage and glass entrance
small street vendor cart with umbrella near the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The character runs across a street crosswalk beneath blue-lit monorail tracks, with the BD SHACK sign growing larger on the right. Futuristic cars pass on the left while the character approaches a 24/7 convenience store and navigates around a food cart.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway entrance to upper pedestrian level

events.description: entering the stairway structure from the open plaza street level
beginning to ascend the concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: running up the concrete stairs toward an upper level walkway, passing a vending machine

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking past the convenience store entrance

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with green painted sides leading upward
illuminated vending machine with red and yellow signage near the stairs
covered pedestrian bridge structure above the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character runs past the 24/7 store and approaches a concrete stairway, ascending toward an upper level. The environment becomes more enclosed with walls on both sides, red neon lighting overhead, and a vending machine visible near the stair entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, red-lit corridor into a sprawling neon plaza before ascending into a confined urban stairwell. It begins beneath a monorail overpass where red neon reflects off wet pavement, moving forward as the corridor opens into a wide plaza illuminated by purple and blue lights. As the character runs across a street crosswalk, the scene expands to reveal towering skyscrapers and the prominent BD SHACK sign, passing futuristic cars and a food cart near a 24/7 convenience store. The environment then shifts from the open street to a more enclosed space as the character approaches a concrete stairway. Finally, the camera follows the ascent toward an upper level, flanked by walls and red overhead lighting with a vending machine standing by the entrance.
